listing.name: DIG for Discogs
listing.shortDescription: Compare pressings and explore your Discogs collection.
listing.longDescription: Use evidence-backed, read-only workflows to compare Discogs pressings, understand scoring caveats, and explore an authenticated collection without modifying Discogs data.
listing.releaseNotes: Initial directory submission of DIG for Discogs: a read-only pressing comparison, Discogs catalogue discovery, and authenticated collection exploration integration.

starterPrompts: Find the best-sounding pressing of an album.
Compare these Discogs release IDs for value.
Pick something mellow from my collection.

toolAnnotations.name: search_collection
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads and filters the authenticated user's collection through the external Discogs service without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: search_discogs
toolAnnotations.justification: Searches the bounded Discogs catalogue and checks only the authenticated user's membership signal without modifying data.

toolAnnotations.name: get_release
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads one Discogs catalogue release and optional permitted market snapshot without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: get_master_release
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads one Discogs master release and its catalogue aggregate without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: get_release_versions
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads and filters the Discogs catalogue versions of one master release without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: find_best_pressing
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads bounded Discogs catalogue evidence and computes a pressing ranking without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: compare_pressings
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads two to five Discogs releases and computes a comparison without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: get_collection_stats
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads the authenticated user's collection through the external Discogs service and returns minimized aggregates without modifying external state.

toolAnnotations.name: get_wantlist
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads only the authenticated user's own wantlist through the external Discogs service and does not modify external state.

toolAnnotations.name: get_recommendations
toolAnnotations.justification: Reads Discogs catalogue data and the authenticated user's collection-derived profile to rank suggestions without modifying external state.

attestations.notes: Attestations must be completed by an authorized owner only after the external gates and production verification are complete.

repositoryExclusions: OpenAI app identifiers and verification secrets
